---
title: '2014/04/27 Journal It was a "Fair" day! Visions and Dreams.'
date: '2014-04-28T02:56:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3464045790375854661'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/20140427-journal-it-was-fair-day.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
  - 'Life Events'
---

Recap day...<br />
<br />
<h4>
Craft Fair:</h4>
<br />
Got up. Got ready. Ate food. Packed up the Honda for Craft Fair Day. Worked hard to set everything up. Made three sales for $20 total. Packed up and went home. Hot, tired, sunburned, and... at least for me... feeling for Anti-Climactic.<br />
<br />
People do these things regularly? So far everyone I've been to has been hours of sitting around, a few people stopping by and saying how nice something was and not buying anything. This is the Anti-Passive-Income life style.<br />
<br />
I think we're best served putting her products and ideas into the world wide web, and letting that be her store front. Maybe we do IN DOOR AIR CONDITIONED shows only? 4 times a year. LOL.<br />
<br />
We got home, ate fast food, and watched a portion of the live people version of 101 Dalmatians.<br />
<br />
Put kids to bed, Flavia is past out on the couch.<br />
<br />
<h4>
Vision:</h4>
<br />
Connor, apparently, had a vision some time ago and is now trying to recall it and share it.<br />
<br />
He's in a room, it's rectangular and dark, black actually, floor to ceiling and wall to wall. There is a bed with pretty designed on it. His brother Preston is a baby and on the bed. It's a big, queen sized bed. The devil is one the bed in the form of a face clock. With a look on his face that says "I'm more powerful than you, what are you going to do about it?!" The walls are covered in black demons. The room is characterized by fear.<br />
<br />
Then he finds himself in a totally blank room, with yellow/gold ceiling and walls, regular carpet floor. He says the devil has stolen everything from this room. But it was filled with peace. God's room.<br />
<br />
In this room he finds the courage and fear flees from it. Connor finds himself with a shield, much like the plasma shield of Star Wars that the Gun Guns use.<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/gungan-shield-5c5512cfc47a.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/gungan-shield-5c5512cfc47a.png" height="170" width="400" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://starwars.wikia.com/wiki/Deflector_shield?file=Gungan_Shield.png" target="_blank">http://starwars.wikia.com/wiki/Deflector_shield?file=Gungan_Shield.png</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
It expands where ever he goes. And fear flees from him. He gets braver and braver the more he walks forward.<br />
<br />
He feels the vision is more than just defending Preston. He feels, very strongly, that he will do something for the United States of America one day.<br />
<br />
We discussed the blank gold room. Gold is the color of the Glory of God. The room without things could be a life, or prayer life, without distractions. When he learns to calm his mind and pray without distractions, he will find the place of peace and Glory?<br />
<br />
Hmmm... Interesting.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
